{{Dialogue|Zelara|You'd be surprised at what a girl can do with her beak.|Lyari|Let me show you.|Luke|Ouch!|attr=The two Ishi Tib females make a pass on Luke Skywalker, before Lyari tugs on his nose|src=<ref name="DN1">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>}}
'''Zelara''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] who along with her companion [[Lyari]] was at the [[Lizil (Hive)|Lizil]] [[Lizil|nest]] in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]]. They became attracted to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] as part of a botched attempt on his part to use [[Mind trick/Legends#Force persuasion|Force persuasion]] on them, resulting in an uncomfortable situation for the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].
